name: Steak Marinade
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons green onions with tops, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the marinade ingredients.
2. Pour the mixture over steaks.
3. Let stand for 3-4 hours at room temperature, turning steaks several times, or overnight in the refrigerator.
4. Broil steaks to the desired level of doneness.
5. This recipe makes enough liquid to marinate 4 steaks.
